configurations.name: server
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && cd server && npx tsx watch src/server.ts

configurations.name: client
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && cd client && npx vite --port 5173
